description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a sleek, rectangular design and a dark, matte finish. The lid and base are both thin, with the lid featuring a smooth, unadorned surface and the base housing a full keyboard layout. The keyboard consists of evenly spaced, square keys and a large rectangular touchpad centered below the keys. The screen is open and blank, with a subtle reflective quality, and the hinge mechanism is compact and cylindrical, running the length of the rear edge. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and plastic materials, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. No visible branding, stickers, or ports are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, dark-colored laptop with a blank screen, full keyboard, and minimalist design. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with no visible logos or stickers.
description_view_0: The laptop is viewed from the back, showing the smooth, featureless lid with no visible branding or ports.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile of the laptop, the open screen, and the edge of the keyboard, with no visible ports or connectors.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full keyboard layout, large touchpad, and the blank, slightly reflective screen.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim design and open screen, with no visible ports or features.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a standard set of square keys and a large touchpad; no numeric keypad or special keys are distinctly visible.
